reason: Browser use feature allows agent to open URLs and retrieve page information via browser tool calls
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent home screen with agent list
Found and clicked "QA-20260508-205629-3jld" agent in the sidebar — Agent chat interface opened, showing message input field and agent settings panel
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was successfully submitted and agent began processing
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed task in 8 seconds and generated response
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." confirming successful browser navigation and page title retrieval
